MAPPING.DESCRIPTION:
IFDYN-M-0-3
Insert records to BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_RPTG_DRVD_VAR DB2 table
MAPPING.NAME: m_DM_RRAP_Ins_BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_RPTG_DRVD_VAR_IFRS

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT ASST_CL_NUM as ASST_CL_NUM, TRIM(ASST_CL_DESC) as ASST_CL_DESC, TRIM(NCR_EXPSR_CL_KEY_VAL) as NCR_EXPSR_CL_KEY_VAL, TRIM(RT_KEY_VAL) as RT_KEY_VAL, TRIM(BASEL_PRD_ABR) as BASEL_PRD_ABR, TRIM(PD_BAND_EXPSR_CL_KEY_VAL) as PD_BAND_EXPSR_CL_KEY_VAL, TRIM(PRD_CD) as PRD_CD, TRIM(SUB_PRD_CD) as SUB_PRD_CD, TRIM(REVISED_EXPSR_OV_125K_F) as REVISED_EXPSR_OV_125K_F, TRIM(HELOC_F) as HELOC_F, TRIM(BASEL_PRD_CD) as BASEL_PRD_CD FROM $ParamPrefix_DM.BASEL_RPTG_PRD_LKP WHERE TRIM(SRC_SYS_CD)='KS'

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup condition
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: PRD_CD = in_PRD_CD AND SUB_PRD_CD = in_SUB_PRD_CD AND REVISED_EXPSR_OV_125K_F = in_REVISED_EXPSR_OV_125K_F AND HELOC_F = in_HELOC_F AND BASEL_PRD_CD = in_BASEL_PRD_CD

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Sql Query
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE:
SELECT DRV.MTH_TM_ID, DRV.BASEL_ACCT_ID, DRV.BASEL_PRD_CD, DRV.HELOC_F, DRV.PIT_STAT_VER_2_CD, DRV.REVISED_EXPSR_AMT, SNP.SRC_CD, SNP.PRD_CD, SNP.SUB_PRD_CD, SNP.BNS_DLQNT_DAY, SNP.CHRG_OFF_CD, SNP.TOT_NEW_BAL_AMT, SNP.TRNST_OU_ID FROM
( SELECT BASEL_ACCT_ID,MTH_TM_ID,TRIM(HELOC_F) HELOC_F, PIT_STAT_VER_2_CD,REVISED_EXPSR_AMT, TRIM(BASEL_PRD_CD) BASEL_PRD_CD FROM $ParamPrefix_DB2NTZ.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_BASE_DRVD_VARS WHERE MTH_TM_ID = $$TM_ID AND CONSM_PRD_TREATMNT_CD='A' AND SML_BUS_F='N' AND PIT_STAT_VER_2_CD IN ('CUR', 'DEF') AND TRNST_EXCLSN_F='N' ) DRV ,
( SELECT BASEL_ACCT_ID,TRIM(SRC_CD) SRC_CD,TRIM(PRD_CD) PRD_CD,TRIM(SUB_PRD_CD) SUB_PRD_CD, BNS_DLQNT_DAY ,CHRG_OFF_CD, TOT_NEW_BAL_AMT, TRNST_OU_ID FROM $ParamPrefix_DB2NTZ.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_MTH_SNAPSHOT SS WHERE MTH_TM_ID = $$TM_ID ) SNP
WHERE DRV.BASEL_ACCT_ID = SNP.BASEL_ACCT_ID

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Maximum Memory Allowed For Auto Memory Attributes
Maximum Percentage of Total Memory Allowed For Auto Memory Attributes
Additional Concurrent Pipelines for Lookup Cache Creation
Save session log for these runs
Session Log File Max Time Period

TASK.DESCRIPTION:
IFDYN-C-0-4
(where the main script is called from) $$SCRIPT_DIR=/owdev/scripts (the environment; DEV, SYS, UAT, PROD) $$ENVMNT=DEV (the project folder without prefix) $$PROJ_FOLDR=STGN_SCENE (the workflow and session name for the abend log file and triger) $$WRKFLW_SESS=wf_STGN_SCENE_Load_DIMs.s_STGN_SCENE_INS_UPD_SCENE_MBR_ACCT_ACTY_TP_DIM
TASK.NAME: cmd_post_session_failure_alert

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Fail task if any command fails
Fail task if any command fails
Fail task if any command fails
Fail task if any command fails
Write Backward Compatible Session Log File
Allow Pushdown for User Incompatible Connections
Sql Query
ATTRIBUTE.VALUE:
SELECT DRV.MTH_TM_ID, DRV.BASEL_ACCT_ID, DRV.BASEL_PRD_CD, DRV.HELOC_F, DRV.PIT_STAT_VER_2_CD, DRV.REVISED_EXPSR_AMT, SNP.SRC_CD, SNP.PRD_CD, SNP.SUB_PRD_CD, SNP.BNS_DLQNT_DAY, SNP.CHRG_OFF_CD, SNP.TOT_NEW_BAL_AMT, SNP.TRNST_OU_ID FROM
( SELECT BASEL_ACCT_ID,MTH_TM_ID,TRIM(HELOC_F) HELOC_F, PIT_STAT_VER_2_CD,REVISED_EXPSR_AMT, TRIM(BASEL_PRD_CD) BASEL_PRD_CD FROM $$TBL_PRE_4.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_BASE_DRVD_VARS WHERE MTH_TM_ID = $$TM_ID AND CONSM_PRD_TREATMNT_CD='A' AND SML_BUS_F='N' AND PIT_STAT_VER_2_CD IN ('CUR', 'DEF') AND TRNST_EXCLSN_F='N' ) DRV ,
( SELECT BASEL_ACCT_ID,TRIM(SRC_CD) SRC_CD,TRIM(PRD_CD) PRD_CD,TRIM(SUB_PRD_CD) SUB_PRD_CD, BNS_DLQNT_DAY ,CHRG_OFF_CD, TOT_NEW_BAL_AMT, TRNST_OU_ID FROM $$TBL_PRE_4.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_MTH_SNAPSHOT SS WHERE MTH_TM_ID = $$TM_ID ) SNP
WHERE DRV.BASEL_ACCT_ID = SNP.BASEL_ACCT_ID

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
ATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT ASST_CL_NUM as ASST_CL_NUM, TRIM(ASST_CL_DESC) as ASST_CL_DESC, TRIM(NCR_EXPSR_CL_KEY_VAL) as NCR_EXPSR_CL_KEY_VAL, TRIM(RT_KEY_VAL) as RT_KEY_VAL, TRIM(BASEL_PRD_ABR) as BASEL_PRD_ABR, TRIM(PD_BAND_EXPSR_CL_KEY_VAL) as PD_BAND_EXPSR_CL_KEY_VAL, TRIM(PRD_CD) as PRD_CD, TRIM(SUB_PRD_CD) as SUB_PRD_CD, TRIM(REVISED_EXPSR_OV_125K_F) as REVISED_EXPSR_OV_125K_F, TRIM(HELOC_F) as HELOC_F, TRIM(BASEL_PRD_CD) as BASEL_PRD_CD FROM $$TBL_PRE_4.BASEL_RPTG_PRD_LKP WHERE TRIM(SRC_SYS_CD)='KS'

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Fail task if any command fails
Fail task if any command fails
Fail task if any command fails
Write Backward Compatible Session Log File
Allow Pushdown for User Incompatible Connections

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Status of the previous task that is not disabled
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_DM_RRAP_Del_BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_RPTG_DRVD_VAR.PrevTaskStatus

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error code for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_DM_RRAP_Del_BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_RPTG_DRVD_VAR.ErrorCode

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error message for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_DM_RRAP_Del_BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_RPTG_DRVD_VAR.ErrorMsg

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Status of the previous task that is not disabled
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $Start.PrevTaskStatus

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error code for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $Start.ErrorCode

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error message for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $Start.ErrorMsg

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Status of the previous task that is not disabled
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_DM_RRAP_Ins_BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_RPTG_DRVD_VAR.PrevTaskStatus

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error code for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_DM_RRAP_Ins_BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_RPTG_DRVD_VAR.ErrorCode

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error message for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_DM_RRAP_Ins_BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_RPTG_DRVD_VAR.ErrorMsg

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Write Backward Compatible Workflow Log File
Save workflow log for these runs
Allow concurrent run with unique run instance name
Allow concurrent run with same run instance name
Maximum number of concurrent runs per Hub

FOLDER.NAME: SHARED
FOLDER.DESCRIPTION: Where all shared objects will reside. Only save sources, targets, transformations and mapplets in this folder. Never save any mappings in here!!!!
